howItWorks.intro: This game download time calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

faq.question: How long does a 70GB game take to download?
faq.answer: At 100 Mbps: about 95 minutes. At 50 Mbps: about 3 hours. At 25 Mbps: about 6 hours. Real speeds are usually 70-80% of your plan speed.

howWeCalculate.intro: This game download time calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
